title: En Chella Kutti Lyrics Isakki Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: En Chella Kutti
Singer: Shreya Ghosal
Movie: Isakki
Music: Srikanth Dheva
Lyrics: Pa Vijay
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
En chella kutti pattu kutti
enna solla daa.
un paasathuku eedu inai
yedhum illa da (2)

Boomi pola ennai enni
suthi varum sandhiraney
nooru jenmam unkoodave
vazhavendum mannavaney
En manadhil vandhavaney
ennuyiraai aanavaney

En chella kutti pattu kutti
enna solla daa.
un paasathuku eedu inai
yedhum illa da

Oh..nethuvara nenjukulle
yaarum illaye
ini unnavida naa vananga
saami illaye... (2)

Urangidum varayil, vizhigalil irupaai
imaigalai thaandi, idhayathil kalapaai

Unnakena naanum, ennakena neeyum
ondraaga, vazhvome,
 naam nooraandu kaalam

En chella kutti pattu kutti
enna solla daa.
un paasathuku eedu inai
yedhum illa da

Vaanam thooral podum kulir
mazhaikaalam
undhan kaigalthaan ennaku
kudaiyaagum (2)

Ini undhan arugil
nizha ena  irupen
un viral pidithu thunaiyena varuven
unnakena thaaney uyirana irupen
moochaai en pechaai ini endrum neeyada

En chella kutti pattu kutti
enna solla daa.
un paasathuku eedu inai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'En Chella Kutti'?

The song expresses deep affection and love, portraying the emotions of a person towards their beloved.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Isakki'?

The movie revolves around themes of love and relationships, showcasing the journey of the characters as they navigate their emotions.

Who is the singer of 'En Chella Kutti'?

The song is sung by the talented Shreya Ghoshal, known for her melodious voice and emotional delivery.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by the renowned lyricist Pa Vijay, who is known for his poetic expressions in Tamil cinema.

When was 'En Chella Kutti' released?

The song was released on May 27, 2013, as part of the movie Isakki.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'En Chella Kutti', the protagonist expresses their heartfelt emotions towards their beloved, encapsulating the joy and warmth of love. The song's soothing melody and Shreya Ghoshal's captivating voice create an enchanting experience for listeners. It beautifully conveys the feelings of affection and longing, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions. The lyrics reflect a deep connection, evoking nostalgia and happiness in the hearts of those who listen.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Chella Kutti from Isakki is a heartwarming melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and affection. Shreya Ghoshal's enchanting vocals bring life to the lyrics penned by Pa Vijay, creating a soothing atmosphere that resonates with listeners. This song is perfect for celebrating special moments and expressing deep emotions.
stanzaMeanings: My dear little one, what should I say? There is no one to match your closeness.
Like the earth, a new beginning comes around, my dear, you should live a hundred lives with me. You came into my heart, you became my life.
My dear little one, what should I say? There is no one to match your closeness.
Oh.. yesterday, there was no one in my heart, now I cannot come to you, God, there is no one...
In the sleep, in the eyes, crossing the dreams, mixing in the heart.
For you and me to be one, let us live together for a hundred years.
My dear little one, what should I say? There is no one to match your closeness.
The sky will shower cool rain, your hands will become my umbrella.
Now, I will be close to you, holding your hand, I will come as your support. I will always be your life, my words will always be about you.
My dear little one, what should I say? There is no one to match your closeness.
